use std::io::Write;

fn format_records(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut output = Vec::new();
    let mut buf = String::with_capacity(256);
    for record in records {
        // GOOD: reuse buffer, clear per record
        buf.clear();
        use std::fmt::Write;
        write!(buf, "{}\t{}\t{}\t{}\n",
            record.id, record.name, record.email, record.score).unwrap();
        output.write_all(buf.as_bytes()).unwrap();
    }
    output
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
    score: f64,
}
